message:
feat(web): add static file serving with ETag and caching (asupersync-3nukl)

StaticFiles handler with MIME detection (30+ types), strong ETag generation,
If-None-Match/304 support, Cache-Control headers, path traversal prevention,
percent-decoding, index file resolution, and custom header injection. 38 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
